name: xb77-remotion
description: xB77 brand source-of-truth: Remotion compositions that emit the seal mark, OG card, hero loop, and launch intro. Run `npm install` then `npx remotion studio` to design, or `npx remotion render <id> <out>` to export.

scripts.render:all: npm run render:mark && npm run render:og && npm run render:hero && npm run render:intro
